listing.noSessions: No upcoming sessions are available right now.
listing.loadError: Error loading events. Please try again later.

eventDetail.registrationClosed: Registration is closed for this session.

page.title: Cancel your registration
page.intro: Enter the email you used to sign up. We will send a confirmation link; your registration is not cancelled until you confirm below.

request.linkExpiryHint: We will email you a secure link to confirm cancellation. The link expires after {hours} hours.
request.requestFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
request.selectSession: Select the session you want to cancel.

confirm.invalidLinkBody: This confirmation link is missing or invalid.
confirm.previewIntro: You are about to cancel your registration for:
confirm.successIntro: You are no longer registered for
confirm.relabelNote: Your registration was marked as cancelled in our system (audit record kept).

success.metadataDescription: Your training signup has been submitted successfully.
success.heading: You're signed up!
success.thankYou: Thank you for registering. Your submission has been received and we'll be in touch with next steps for your training session.
